title: pseudognaphalium hypoleucum
intro: Pseudognaphalium hypoleucum, also known as White everlasting, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the daisy family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of White everlasting include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties.
